'''Sestooine''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] world. It was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

It was first colonized during the onset of the [[Kymoodon Era]] along with [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]] in the northern quadrant.<ref name="TEA" />
